title: Communauté intercommunale du Nord de La Réunion
summary: Communauté intercommunale du Nord de La Réunion is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, centred on the city of Saint-Denis. It is located in Réunion, an overseas department of France. It was created in December 2000. Its area is 287.8 km2. Its population was 207,487 in 2014, of which 150,535 in Saint-Denis proper.
text:
Communauté intercommunale du Nord de La Réunion is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, centred on the city of Saint-Denis. It is located in Réunion, an overseas department of France. It was created in December 2000. Its area is 287.8 km2. Its population was 207,487 in 2014, of which 150,535 in Saint-Denis proper.

Composition
The communauté d'agglomération consists of the following 3 communes:

Saint-Denis
Sainte-Marie
Sainte-Suzanne
